decks.notes: The deck focuses on a high-speed combo strategy revolving around generating lots of mana quickly, using spells like Dark Ritual and Lion's Eye Diamond to fuel powerful win condition cards like Tendrils of Agony. It also includes card draw and filtering with Brainstorm and Burning Wish, as well as disruption with Silence and Hexing Squelcher. The deck aims to assemble its combo pieces rapidly and efficiently, while also being able to protect itself from disruption and control strategies commonly found in the Legacy format.

The deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with cards like Ancient Tomb and Lotus Petal to cheat out powerful creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Atraxa, Grand Unifier using Show and Tell or Sneak Attack. It also utilizes cards like Omniscience and Yggdrasil, Rebirth Engine to generate additional value and maintain board presence. With a strong counter package including Force of Will and Flusterstorm, as well as disruptive cards like Stifle and Brazen Borrower, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with its explosive plays and game-ending combos.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game through various spells and creatures, utilizing a mix of green, white, and blue cards. By using cards like Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd, Swords to Plowshares, and Force of Will, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy and establish board control. Leyline of the Guildpact and Leyline Binding help to further control the game, while cards like Brainstorm and Ponder provide card advantage and selection. Overall, the deck focuses on controlling the game tempo and outmaneuvering the opponent to secure victory.

This combo deck aims to win the game in a single turn by milling the entire library with cards like Balustrade Spy and Undercity Informer, then using the interaction between Narcomoeba, Dread Return, and Thassa's Oracle to win on the spot. The deck utilizes fast mana sources like Lotus Petal and Simian Spirit Guide to power out its spells quickly, while also disrupting the opponent with cards like Duress and Cabal Therapy. Pact of Negation helps protect the combo from disruption, making it crucial for the deck's success.

The main concept of this deck is to use artifacts and blue spells to create a fast and aggressive playstyle. The deck focuses on utilizing cards like Emry, Lurker of the Loch, Lotus Petal, and Urza's Saga to generate mana quickly and bring out powerful creatures like Kappa Cannoneer and Patchwork Automaton. The deck also includes disruptive cards like Force of Will and Pithing Needle to control the opponent's game plan. By combining these elements, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of speed, power, and disruption.

The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan by using cards like Thoughtseize, Fatal Push, and Force of Will while deploying threats like Murktide Regent and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares to apply pressure. It also utilizes efficient card draw and selection spells like Brainstorm and Ponder to maintain tempo and consistency. The inclusion of disruptive lands like Wasteland combined with aggressive creatures like Barrowgoyf and Orcish Bowmasters allows the deck to control the board and win through quick and efficient creature beats.

The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Archon of Cruelty, then using reanimation spells like Reanimate and Animate Dead to bring them back onto the battlefield for a quick victory. It also includes disruption spells like Cabal Therapy and Thoughtseize to control the opponent's hand and prevent them from stopping the combo. The mana base is optimized for fast, consistent plays, with lots of fetch lands and powerful dual lands to support the strategy. The deck aims to win the game in just a few turns through a powerful combo.

The deck focuses on controlling the opponent's resources and tempo through a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and disruptive creatures like Murktide Regent and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd. Stoneforge Mystic is used to search for equipment like Batterskull to gain advantage in combat. The deck also includes card advantage engines like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Meticulous Archive to maintain card advantage. Overall, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while establishing its own threats to win the game.

This deck aims to quickly assemble the combo pieces needed to win the game with a single Doomsday spell. It includes various card selection and mana acceleration tools to find and cast Doomsday as efficiently as possible, while also protecting the combo with disruptive cards like Force of Will and Thoughtseize. Thassa's Oracle is the win condition of choice, allowing the player to win the game instantly after resolving Doomsday. The deck also includes additional ways to filter through the deck and disrupt opponents' strategies, making it a versatile and powerful combo deck in the Legacy format.

This deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategy while applying pressure with aggressive creatures. It utilizes cards like Aether Vial and Stoneforge Mystic to cheat out powerful creatures, while also having access to disruptive cards like Thoughtseize and Swords to Plowshares. The inclusion of Yorion, Sky Nomad as a companion provides additional value and flexibility. With a mix of removal, disruption, and efficient creatures, this deck aims to control the battlefield and establish a dominant board presence.

The deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana using Cloudpost and Urza's Tower to cast powerful spells and abilities. It utilizes cards like The One Ring and Planar Nexus to generate additional resources and disrupt opponents. Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Ugin, Eye of the Storms serve as powerful finishers, while cards like Disruptor Flute and Prophetic Prism provide card draw and filtering. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with large threats and overwhelming mana advantage, ultimately leading to a swift victory through combo plays.

The deck focuses on quickly cheating powerful creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Griselbrand into play using cards like Sneak Attack and Show and Tell. It also includes countermagic like Force of Will and Flusterstorm to protect these game-winning plays. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with these powerful threats before they can effectively respond, ultimately securing victory through the use of high-impact creatures and powerful combo interactions. Additionally, it utilizes cards like Brainstorm and Ponder to help dig for key pieces of the combo while also maintaining card advantage.

The main focus of this UR Tempo deck is to maintain control of the game by using efficient spells and creatures to disrupt the opponent's game plan while also putting pressure on them with aggressive threats. The deck utilizes a mix of countermagic, burn spells, and disruptive creatures like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Murktide Regent to establish tempo and win the game quickly. By leveraging card advantage through cards like Brainstorm and Mishra's Bauble, the deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent to secure victory.

This deck focuses on controlling the board with removal spells like Fatal Push and Sheoldred's Edict, while also disrupting the opponent's game plan with counterspells like Force of Will. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides card advantage and helps dig for answers, while creatures like Orcish Bowmasters and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares apply pressure on the opponent. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent through a combination of efficient threats and disruption, ultimately overwhelming them with a combination of aggression and resource denial.

This deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategy while applying pressure with aggressive creatures. The deck is designed to keep the opponent off balance with counterspells like Force of Will and disruption spells like Thoughtseize. The deck also utilizes powerful threats such as Murktide Regent and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares to quickly close out the game. By efficiently controlling the board and quickly establishing a clock, this deck aims to outpace and overwhelm the opponent before they can establish their own game plan.

This deck focuses on controlling the game through counterspells, removal spells, and card advantage. It aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while generating value with cards like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Snapcaster Mage. The deck also utilizes powerful planeswalkers like Lórien Revealed and Vivi Ornitier to generate additional value and provide long-term advantage. Terminus serves as a board wipe option, while cards like Prismatic Ending and Swords to Plowshares provide efficient removal. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver opponents in a long game, using its control elements to secure victory.
